title: armeria canescens var. dalmatica
intro: Armeria canescens var. dalmatica, also known as the Dalmatian armeria, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Thelypodium genus. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe and calm the body, reducing stress and anxiety while promoting relaxation and better sleep. The herbal preparations of Dalmatian armeria include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
